title: Numbers to 120
description: Practice finding missing numbers in a list of numbers between 0 and 120.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is missing in the grid below?**

The missing number is [[‚ėÉ input-number 2]].

![](${‚ė£ LOCALPATH}/images/00f1d61e23ed7a144166dd0328dc17ae.png)
hints:
Start at $100$ and count on by $1$'s.  

After $104$ comes $104$ plus $1$ more.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What whole number comes right after $117$? **  

 [[‚ėÉ input-number 1]]
hints:
Start at $110$ and count by $1$'s.

When you get to $117$, go one more.

To go one more, find $117$ on the chart.

![](${‚ė£ LOCALPATH}/images/c7fb0e9db775b0647f20a52345cf52dd.png)

What comes right after $117$ on the chart?
